title: mapouria retiphlebia
intro: Mapouria retiphlebia is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the Annonaceae family which includes other plants like custard apple and guanabana. The medicinal properties of Mapouria retiphlebia include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Mapouria retiphlebia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
